reviews.comment:
tendrian que pasar a ser YPF FULL es verdad, pero la ubicacion y comodidad mas la atencion hace de una buena estacion de servicio. Ideal para frenar y estirar las piernas. Tiene restaurante ademas. parque / tarjetas

(Translated by Google)
They should really become a YPF Full station, it's true, but the location, convenience, and service make it a good service station. Ideal for stopping and stretching your legs. It also has a restaurant. Parking/credit cards

reviews.comment:
Excelente. bien atendido, todos los servicios funcionando. depues de sufrir los ACA de La Pampa y 25 de Mayo, ACA Zapala parece de otro planeta.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent. Great service, all services working. After suffering through the ACA branches on La Pampa and 25 de Mayo, ACA Zapala seems like something from another planet.
